hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // empty' | { read -r file; if [[ "$file" == *.java ]]; then cd /home/t0266li/Documents/myFinance/backend && mvn test -q 2>&1 | tail -15; exit ${PIPESTATUS[0]}; elif [[ "$file" == *.jsx || "$file" == *.js || "$file" == *.ts || "$file" == *.tsx ]]; then source ~/.nvm/nvm.sh && nvm use v20.20.2 > /dev/null 2>&1 && cd /home/t0266li/Documents/myFinance && node_modules/.bin/eslint "$file" 2>&1 | tail -10; fi; }
